title: SDK Multi-Repo Deployment & Commercial Launch Checklist
desc: Complete deployment guide: per-repo Eye isolation, DataDir/pipe architecture, config.json setup, SDK packaging (MIT launcher + closed core), GitHub Release workflow, onboarding, and commercial launch checklist
steps: PROJECT ROOT DETECTION [DONE 2026-04-26]: walk up from CWD (then AppContext.BaseDirectory fallback) looking for .git OR .wkappbot OR CLAUDE.md -- first match wins; falls back to exe dir. Source: csharp/src/Shared/ProjectRoot.cs
DATADIR PER-REPO [DONE 2026-04-26]: projectRoot/.wkappbot/hq/ (was exe-relative bin/wkappbot.hq/); single definition in Program.cs:179; all 65 DataDir usages follow automatically

PIPE NAMES PER-REPO [DONE 2026-04-26]: wkappbot_eye_ipc_{hash8} and wkappbot_elevated_{hash8} where hash8 = MD5(root.ToLowerInvariant())[0..8] hex; ElevatedEyeProxy.cs:96 + :1001; Launcher/Program.cs updated

ISOLATION VERIFIED [TESTED 2026-04-26]: <repo-root> (hash 87d48d67) and D:/GitHub/wkappbot-sdk (hash 0c0188e3) run independent Eye instances; eye tick from sdk returns label DG-wkappbot-sdk not DG-WKAppBot; wkappbot-pub (nested, hash 27b310e7) also isolated

CONFIG.JSON PER-REPO [TODO]: per-repo .wkappbot/config.json loader at startup; keys: slack_app_token, slack_bot_token, slack_channel, workspace; fallback chain: .wkappbot/config.json -> DataDir/profiles/slack_exp/webhook.json for backwards compat

LAUNCHER SOURCE SEPARATION [TODO]: strip wkappbot-sdk repo to contain ONLY WKAppBot.Launcher (MIT) + Shared; remove Core/CLI/WebBot/Win32 private sources; wkappbot-core.exe ships as closed binary in bin/ (downloaded on first run or bundled in release zip)
GITHUB RELEASE WORKFLOW [TODO]: tag vX.Y.Z -> GHA builds Launcher AOT + packages core binary -> uploads wkappbot-sdk-vX.Y.Z.zip to GitHub Releases -> users unzip and run setup.ps1
SETUP SCRIPT setup.ps1 [TODO]: copy .wkappbot/config.json.template -> .wkappbot/config.json; prompt user for Slack tokens; add bin/ to PATH; run wkappbot eye tick to verify connection

SLACK BOT ONBOARDING GUIDE [TODO]: create Slack app at api.slack.com/apps; enable Socket Mode + Event Subscriptions (message.channels + app_mention); copy xapp- and xoxb- tokens to .wkappbot/config.json; invite bot to channel; run wkappbot eye tick -- expect Eye heartbeat in Slack

SELF-UPDATE MECHANISM [TODO]: wkappbot self-update command -- checks GitHub Releases API for latest tag; downloads new wkappbot-core.exe to bin/.new.exe; existing Eye hot-swap infra picks it up automatically; no manual steps

COMMERCIAL SUCCESS [TODO]: (1) MIT launcher repo draws contributors + trust; (2) closed core: free personal / paid activation key for commercial+team; (3) landing page + demo GIF showing Eye card + callout UX; (4) Discord or Slack community for early adopters; (5) opt-in usage telemetry; (6) wkappbot.io domain or GitHub Pages

COMPLETED ITEMS (2026-04-29): [DONE] GitHub Release workflow: tag vX.Y.Z-sdk -> release.yml builds Launcher AOT + fetches core from core-* release -> uploads wkappbot-vX.Y.Z-sdk.zip. [DONE] Core pipeline: publish-core-for-sdk.yml in dev repo publishes standalone wkappbot-core.exe on build-csharp success. [DONE] Purchase URL: CdpLicenseNag.cs + LicenseNagWindow.cs -> SUBSCRIBE.md on GitHub. [DONE] Repo PUBLIC 2026-04-29 with branch protection + secret scanning. [DONE] 100-item launch checklist (85 done) tracked in GitHub Issue #1. [TODO] setup.ps1 exists but config.json template needs Slack prompting. [TODO] LAUNCHER_SOURCE_SEPARATION (major refactor -- suggest filed). [TODO] self-update command.

requirements.expect: label DG-wkappbot-pub with hash 27b310e7 (isolated from parent repo)
pipe names differ: wkappbot_eye_ipc_87d48d67 vs wkappbot_eye_ipc_0c0188e3
Slack tokens loaded from config.json not from webhook.json [TODO]
only WKAppBot.Launcher + Shared (no CLI Core WebBot Win32) [TODO: launcher strip]
latest tag vX.Y.Z with wkappbot-sdk-vX.Y.Z.zip asset [TODO: GHA release]
.wkappbot/config.json created, wkappbot eye tick exits 0 [TODO: setup script]
downloads latest core to bin/.new.exe; Eye hot-swap completes within 30s [TODO: self-update cmd]

requirements.cmd: wkappbot eye tick (after fresh setup with user Slack tokens)
requirements.expect: Eye heartbeat visible in Slack channel [TODO: onboarding]
shows version + activation status (personal/commercial) [TODO: commercial model]

author: claude
